description: As part of the onboarding process, HR needs to trigger a request for IT to provision a laptop and phone for a new hire.

nodes.task_description: Identify the new hire and their role/department.

expected_outcome.expected: Onboarding specialist identifies the new hire's record.

nodes.task_description: Determine the standard equipment package for the new hire's role.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist determines the role requires a standard developer laptop.

nodes.task_description: Create a service ticket for the IT department with the new hire's details and required equipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Specialist successfully creates an IT ticket for hardware provisioning.
